user.title: Connect to Hi-Mit II
user.description: Enter your Hisense Hi-Mit II account credentials.

home.title: Select home
home.description: Your account has multiple homes. Select the one containing your heat pump.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Hi-Mit II
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your updated credentials.

reconfigure.title: Update Hi-Mit II credentials
reconfigure.description: Enter your new Hisense Hi-Mit II account credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Hi-Mit II cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.no_homes: No homes found for this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.
